**SGSC-AI Intelligence Probe Executed**

Nanjing Yuezhi Electronics Co., Ltd. is yet another standard slice of a 'Zhujiang Road computer city PC assembly shop' that was extremely crudely categorized into heavy-asset manufacturing by the official system. The forensic engine has forcibly stripped the underlying false consumer electronics production capacity illusion triggered by Apple Inc. The official commercial system, merely because its enterprise name contains the word 'Electronics,' mechanically categorized it into 'Computer, Communication and Other Electronic Equipment Manufacturing - Electronic Device Manufacturing.' However, the physical probe directly uncovered its micro baseline: this is a super-old shell established in 2009, but its registered and paid-in capital is a pitiful '30,000' RMB! The 2024 insured headcount is only '1 person.' The most core demotion strike comes from its geographical coordinates: 'Room 727, Block B, No. 362 Zhujiang Road, Xuanwu District, Nanjing City.' In the commercial map of the Yangtze River Delta, Zhujiang Road is the absolute synonym for a 'computer and digital hypermarket.' In a 7th-floor single-room office of an electronics market building, with 30,000 RMB, employing 1 worker to establish an electronic device production line? This is completely absurd. Reviewing its extremely down-to-earth business license: its former name was even 'Office Supplies Co., Ltd.,' and its business scope explicitly states 'sales of office supplies, electronic products; computer sales, repair, maintenance, and assembly.' The diagnostic conclusion is without suspense: this is absolutely not an electronic manufacturing plant; this is a remarkably pure Micro IT Retailer & PC Assembly Shop located in the Zhujiang Road computer city.
